source: next build output (this branch); measured, not aspirational
notes: Budgets are first-load JS (kB) reported by `next build`. The CI build step (.github/workflows/ci.yml) prints current sizes on every PR so regressions are visible in the log; automated enforcement is a follow-up.
watch: Fund/Console widgets: prefer cache-first over live per-item provider fan-out on first paint (audit N+1).
Heavy modules (/vitality 391kB) are candidates for route-level code splitting / dynamic import.
Do not cache financially material data without the visible freshness model (FreshnessBadge).
